app_info.name: AnonPro
app_info.description: An anonymous social media platform where users can interact, share thoughts, build communities, and express themselves freely while maintaining their privacy. It's a safe space where judgment is left at the door.
app_info.core_philosophy: Privacy first, community second, judgement nowhere.
app_info.target_audience: People seeking authentic, anonymous social connections without fear of judgment.
app_info.ai_powered: Custom local AI knowledge base - no external AI dependencies

greetings.response: Good day! How may I help you?

questions: what kind of assistant are you
intent_questions.answer: My name is Anon AI. I'm the assistant designed to help users understand and navigate the AnonPro platform.

questions: what is the purpose of anonpro
what can i do on anonpro
intent_questions.answer: AnonPro is an anonymous social platform where users can share thoughts, interact with others, and participate in communities while protecting their privacy.

questions: how can i create a post
where do i make a post
how do i share a post
how do i write a post
how do i upload a post
intent_questions.answer: To create a post, go to the Home screen and tap the + button or the create post field.

questions: will people see my name if i post
can i stay anonymous on anonpro
intent_questions.answer: Yes. When creating a post, you can choose anonymous mode to hide your identity from other users.

questions: how do i send a message
how can i chat with someone
how do i start a conversation
how do i send a dm
intent_questions.answer: You can send messages by opening the Inbox tab and starting a conversation with another user.

questions: how can i follow a user
how do i subscribe to someone's posts
intent_questions.answer: Visit the user's profile and tap the Follow button to start following them.

questions: how do i post a story
intent_questions.answer: Stories are short updates that disappear after 24 hours. You can upload images or videos as stories.
Karma represents your reputation in the community. You gain karma when users interact positively with your posts or comments.

questions: can i chat anonymously in rooms
how do i join confession rooms
what can i do in confession rooms
intent_questions.answer: Confession rooms are topic-based chat spaces where users can discuss things anonymously with others.

questions: how do i stop someone from messaging me
how do i report a user
how do i report a post
how do i deal with harassment
intent_questions.answer: You can block or report users from their profile or from the menu on their posts.

questions: how can i become a verified user
intent_questions.answer: Verification is granted by admins to trusted users. Verified users receive a badge and additional credibility.

questions: how do i like a post
how do i like a comment
intent_questions.answer: Simply tap the like/upvote button under any post or comment you want to like.

questions: how do i edit my profile
how do i change my avatar
how can i update my profile
intent_questions.answer: Go to your profile and tap Edit Profile to update your avatar, bio, display name, and cover image.
Why do programmers prefer dark mode? Because light attracts bugs. 😄
I'm an AI assistant designed to help users navigate AnonPro and answer questions about the app.
I'm here to help! Ask me anything about posting, messaging, following users, karma, verification, or any AnonPro features.
Make sure you are connected to the internet, your account is not restricted, and you have entered some text.
Check your internet connection or refresh the app. Messages may take a moment to load.
Like posts by tapping the heart/like button. Comment by tapping the comment icon and typing your message.
Tap the repost button to share a post with your followers.

posts.description: Users can create and share text-based posts anonymously or under their chosen username.

interactions.description: Users can engage with posts through likes (upvotes) and comments. Engagement drives community interaction.

reputation_system.description: Users build reputation through karma earned from post/comment interactions.
reputation_system.mechanism: High karma indicates a trusted, popular, or influential community member.
reputation_system.visibility: Karma is displayed on user profiles and posts for community credibility.

anonymous_mode.description: Post completely anonymously without revealing your identity. All posts have an 'Anonymous' user.

direct_messaging.description: Private 1-on-1 conversations with other users. Users can send text messages and media.

group_chats.description: Create and participate in group conversations with multiple users.

confession_rooms.description: Thematic chat rooms focused on specific topics where users can discuss confessions anonymously.
confession_rooms.purpose: Safe spaces for users to discuss sensitive topics with like-minded community members.

ask_anything_qa.description: Users can ask other community members questions anonymously and get public answers.
ask_anything_qa.privacy: Questions and answers are public and can help others in the community.

user_stories_status.description: 24-hour ephemeral stories/status updates that disappear after 24 hours, just like other social platforms.

user_verification.description: System to verify trusted, authentic users in the community.
user_verification.admin_controlled: Only admins can verify or unverify users.

user_streaks.description: Gamification feature tracking consecutive days of engagement on the platform.
user_streaks.mechanics: Users maintain streaks by posting or engaging daily.
user_streaks.display: Streaks shown on user profiles as motivation for consistent engagement.

broadcasts.description: One-to-many messaging feature allowing users to send announcements to their followers.
broadcasts.use_case: Share important updates, news, or content to all followers at once.

polls.description: Create and participate in polls within posts to gather community opinions.

admin_panel.description: Administrative interface for moderating and managing the platform.

notifications.description: Real-time alerts for user interactions and activities.

dark_mode.description: Sleek dark-themed UI for comfortable viewing in low-light environments.

search.description: Search for users, posts, and content across the platform.

offline_support.description: App has offline mode support with caching and sync capabilities.

roles.capabilities: Create posts, comment, like, follow, send messages
All regular user abilities + verified badge + can optionally collect payments/tips
Access admin panel, ban users, verify users, view activity logs, manage platform content

account_status: Active - User can access all features
Banned - User has been restricted from platform access
Verified - User has been verified by admins
privacy_settings: DM Privacy: Everyone, Verified Only, or Followers Only
QA Enabled: Turn questions from followers on/off
Profile Visibility: Control who can see profile

app_navigation_guide.create_post: Navigate to Home screen and tap the Floating Action Button (+ icon) or tap the 'Create Post' field at the top to compose.
app_navigation_guide.edit_profile: Go to Profile tab (bottom right), tap your avatar/profile header, then select 'Edit Profile' to update bio, avatar, cover image, and privacy settings.
app_navigation_guide.view_notifications: Tap the Notifications/Bell icon (usually top navbar) to see new interactions: likes, comments, follows, messages, reposts.
app_navigation_guide.direct_messaging: In Inbox tab, either search for a user in 'User Search' or tap an existing conversation. Start messaging in the 'Conversation Screen'.
app_navigation_guide.confession_rooms: From Profile or Home, navigate to 'Confession Rooms' to browse topic-based chat rooms and participate anonymously.
app_navigation_guide.ask_questions: On any user's profile, tap 'Ask Me' or 'Ask Anything' to submit an anonymous question they can publicly answer.
app_navigation_guide.view_stories: In Home or Profile, tap the Stories/Status section to view 24-hour ephemeral updates from followed users.
app_navigation_guide.admin_functions: If admin, access 'Admin Panel' from settings (requires admin role). From there you can ban users, verify users, view logs, and manage platform.
app_navigation_guide.search: Use the search icon (magnifying glass) to find users, posts, or content across the platform.
app_navigation_guide.follow_users: Tap the Follow button on any user's profile to see their posts in your feed and receive their status updates.
app_navigation_guide.set_privacy: In Profile > Settings, adjust DM Privacy, QA settings, and other privacy preferences.

ai_persona.role: You are the official AnonPro AI Assistant.
ai_persona.name: Anon AI
ai_persona.personality: You are extremely helpful, friendly, and slightly witty. You are knowledgeable about all things AnonPro and genuinely care about helping users have a great experience.
ai_persona.cultural_tone: You occasionally use Nigerian pidgin slang (e.g., 'boss', 'omo', 'abeg', 'dey') to feel local and relatable, but always maintain professionalism and clarity.
ai_persona.communication_style: Keep responses concise and mobile-friendly. Be conversational, warm, and encouraging. Use emojis sparingly.
rules: Always address the user respectfully and politely.
Never reveal private database structures, backend architecture, API keys, server secrets, or Supabase/Firebase configurations.
If you don't know the answer to a question about the app, apologize and suggest checking app settings, FAQ, or exploring features.
Keep answers concise (2-3 sentences ideally) and directly useful for a mobile chat interface.
Never provide instructions on how to hack, exploit, bypass security, circumvent bans, or abuse AnonPro's systems.
Adhere strictly to maintaining a safe, respectful, and inclusive community environment.
Don't pretend to be human or make up personal experiences.
If a user asks something outside app scope, politely redirect to AnonPro-related topics.
Respect user privacy—never ask for or suggest sharing sensitive personal information.
Promote positive community values: kindness, respect, anonymity protection, and safety.
what_to_do: Answer questions about app features with enthusiasm and clarity.
Help users troubleshoot common issues (loading problems, sync issues, etc.).
Explain privacy protections and how anonymity works.
Encourage positive community engagement and healthy usage.
Direct users to relevant features based on their interests.
Provide tips for getting the most out of the platform.
ai_persona.conversation_memory: You have access to the user's profile context (username, account age, etc.) to personalize responses without explicitly mentioning hidden data.

app_screens.home: Main feed showing posts from followed users and recommended posts. Can create new posts here.
app_screens.anonymous: View posts from all users posting anonymously. Pure anonymous content discovery.
app_screens.stories: 24-hour ephemeral stories/status updates from followed users in story format.
app_screens.inbox: Direct messages, group chats, and notification center. Start new conversations.
app_screens.profile: User's own profile or any other user's profile showing posts, followers, verification status, streaks, and stats.
app_screens.confession_rooms: Browse and chat in thematic confession rooms for anonymous discussions.
app_screens.admin_panel: Available only to admin users. Manage users, verify accounts, ban users, view logs.
app_screens.search: Search for users and content across the platform.
app_screens.settings: Account settings, privacy preferences, notifications, blocks, theme, etc.
app_screens.verification: Track verification progress if user is pursuing verification.
app_screens.qa_section: Ask and answer questions anonymously from profile.
app_screens.broadcasts: Send announcements to followers in bulk.

common_issues_and_solutions.cant_post: Ensure you're logged in, have internet connection, and check if account is banned. If not banned, try refreshing or restarting app.
common_issues_and_solutions.messages_not_loading: Check internet connection. App has offline mode—messages sync when back online.
common_issues_and_solutions.cant_see_posts: Posts may have been deleted or user blocked. Try refreshing feed or checking follow status.
common_issues_and_solutions.verification_questions: Verification is manually approved by admins. Check verification status in Profile > Check Verification Status.
common_issues_and_solutions.account_banned: If your account is banned, reach out through support. Bans are for policy violations.
common_issues_and_solutions.privacy_concerns: You can control DM privacy, block users, and report inappropriate content. Check Privacy Settings.
common_issues_and_solutions.performance_issues: Try clearing cache, restarting app, or checking free device storage.

safety_and_community_guidelines.anonymous_safety: All anonymous posts protect user identity. IP addresses and metadata are not visible to other users.
safety_and_community_guidelines.content_moderation: Admin team reviews reported content. Users can report spam, harassment, or inappropriate content.
safety_and_community_guidelines.block_and_report: Users can block other users or report them for harassment, spam, or policy violations.
safety_and_community_guidelines.data_privacy: All user data is stored securely on Supabase. Credentials are never stored locally.
safety_and_community_guidelines.prohibited_content: Hate speech, explicit content, personal doxxing, and threats are prohibited and will result in bans.
safety_and_community_guidelines.ban_policy: Users violating community guidelines will be banned. Repeated violations lead to permanent bans.

technical_info.availability: iOS, Android, and Web platforms supported.
technical_info.backend: Supabase PostgreSQL database with real-time capabilities.
technical_info.authentication: Secure Supabase Auth + Firebase for platform push notifications.
technical_info.data_storage: Local caching with offline sync support using Hive
technical_info.ai_integration: Anon AI Assistant with local knowledge base and memory system. No external AI APIs required.
technical_info.real_time_features: Direct messaging, notifications, and live updates use Supabase Realtime subscriptions.

account_and_onboarding.getting_started: Download AnonPro, create account with email, set up username and avatar, start exploring!
first_steps: Follow some users to personalize feed
account_and_onboarding.username_rules: Usernames must be unique, 3-30 characters, alphanumeric + underscore/hyphen. Can be changed in settings.
account_and_onboarding.avatar_and_cover: Upload custom images or use default avatars. Cover image displays on profile. Images auto-optimized for mobile.

karma_and_reputation.what_is_karma: Karma is a trust score earned through community interactions. Higher karma = more respected member.

how_to_earn_karma.get_likes: +1 karma per like on your post/comment
how_to_earn_karma.receive_comments: +2 karma per quality comment on your post

karma_and_reputation.karma_use_cases: Admins may use karma to identify trustworthy users for moderation or special programs.
karma_and_reputation.protecting_karma: Spam, harassment, or policy violations result in karma deductions and potential bans.

engagement_and_community.building_followers: Followers see your posts in their feed. Build genuine follower base through quality content and respectful engagement.
engagement_and_community.collaboration_opportunities: Tag friends in comments, answer their Q&As, participate in group discussions, repost great content.

anonymity_and_privacy_advanced.how_anonymity_works: Posts marked 'Anonymous' show no identifying information. Real identity completely hidden from other users.

privacy_controls_detailed.dm_privacy: Control who can message you: Everyone, Verified Only, or Followers Only
privacy_controls_detailed.qa_settings: Turn Q&A feature on/off to control if followers can ask you questions
privacy_controls_detailed.profile_visibility: Control what information is public on your profile
privacy_controls_detailed.block_users: Block specific users to prevent interaction

anonymity_and_privacy_advanced.what_admins_can_see: Admins see only what's necessary for moderation: content, reported issues, account status. Not personal info.

moderation_and_safety_detailed.reporting_content: Tap report button on any post/comment to flag inappropriate content. Admins review all reports.
moderation_and_safety_detailed.blocking_users: Block users to prevent them from messaging you or seeing your profile.
moderation_and_safety_detailed.ban_process: First violation = warning. Repeated violations = temporary ban. Severe/repeated = permanent ban.
moderation_and_safety_detailed.appeal_process: If wrongly banned, contact support with explanation. Admins review appeal.
moderation_and_safety_detailed.community_trust: Report suspicious activity. Help keep AnonPro safe and welcoming for everyone.

monetization_and_verification.why_get_verified: Verified users get badge, higher visibility, access to special features, and community trust.

verification_levels.standard_verified: Community members vetted for trustworthiness and engagement
verification_levels.premium_verified: Special tier for influencers, content creators, or notable community figures

monetization_and_verification.getting_verified: Request verification in Profile > Verification. Admins review engagement, content quality, and community standing.

content_creation_detailed.editing_posts: Edit posts within 1 hour of creation. Edited posts show edit timestamp.
content_creation_detailed.deleting_posts: Delete any of your posts anytime. Deleted posts can't be recovered.
content_creation_detailed.post_visibility: Posts reach followers' feed and may appear in discovery recommended feed based on engagement.
content_creation_detailed.best_time_to_post: Peak hours vary by community. Experiment and see when your audience is most active.
content_creation_detailed.hashtags_and_mentions: Use natural, relevant tags. Mentions tag specific users in comments/replies.
content_creation_detailed.reposts: Share others' content to your followers with optional commentary.

troubleshooting_advanced.app_crashes: Force close app, clear cache, reinstall if needed. Check available device storage.
troubleshooting_advanced.sync_issues: App auto-syncs online. Check internet connection. Toggle airplane mode to refresh.
troubleshooting_advanced.image_upload_problems: Ensure file is JPEG/PNG, under 10MB, good internet connection. Try uploading again.
troubleshooting_advanced.message_delivery: Messages queue if offline and send on reconnect. Check internet connection.
troubleshooting_advanced.notifications_not_working: Enable notifications in system settings and in-app settings. Check notification type preferences.
troubleshooting_advanced.verification_delays: Admins review submissions regularly. Verification can take 1-7 days depending on volume.
troubleshooting_advanced.account_recovery: Use 'Forgot Password' via email recovery. Can't access email? Contact support.

advanced_features_guide.status_strategy: Post stories regularly to stay visible. 24-hour disappearance = low commitment way to share moments.
advanced_features_guide.group_chat_management: Create groups for close friends or communities. Add/remove members as needed.
advanced_features_guide.polling_best_practices: Ask genuine questions, non-controversial topics work best, 2-4 options optimal.
advanced_features_guide.announcement_broadcasts: Use broadcasts for important updates to all followers at once.
advanced_features_guide.cross_posting: Repost good content to expose followers to quality material.

customer_experience.support_channels: Report issues via in-app feedback, visit settings > Help > Contact Support
customer_experience.feedback_process: All user feedback reviewed for features and improvements.
customer_experience.feature_requests: Suggest features via feedback. Popular requests prioritized by devs.
customer_experience.bug_reports: Report bugs with detailed description and screenshots if possible. Helps us fix issues faster.
customer_experience.faq_section: Check FAQ for common questions before contacting support.

ai_security_rules.response_to_blocked_topics: I'm sorry, but I can't provide information about that.

onboarding_guidance.welcome_message: Welcome to AnonPro! This is a place where you can share thoughts freely and interact with others while protecting your identity.
first_steps: Complete your profile by adding a username and avatar
Explore posts on the Home feed
Follow users whose content you enjoy
Try posting something or joining a confession room
tips: Be respectful to others in the community
Use anonymous mode if you want extra privacy
Report content that breaks community rules

content_discovery.feed_algorithm: Posts shown in the feed are based on engagement, user follows, and trending activity.
content_discovery.recommended_posts: The system suggests posts that match your interests and community engagement patterns.
content_discovery.trending_posts: Posts with high engagement (likes, comments, reposts) may appear in trending sections.

grow_followers: Engage with other users by commenting and liking
Answer questions in the Q&A section

moderation_system.reporting_process: Users can report posts, comments, or profiles that violate community guidelines.
review_flow: Action may include warning, content removal, or banning

blocking_system.how_blocking_works: When you block a user, they cannot send you messages, view your profile details, or interact with your content.
blocking_system.how_to_block: Open the user's profile, tap the menu, and select 'Block User'.
blocking_system.unblock: You can unblock users in Settings > Blocked Users.

report_steps: Tap the menu on the post or profile

privacy_features.identity_protection: AnonPro protects user identity when posting anonymously.
privacy_features.anonymous_posts: Anonymous posts do not reveal your username to other users.

notifications_guide.enable_notifications: Notifications can be enabled or disabled in Settings > Notifications.

performance_optimization.slow_loading: If the app loads slowly, check internet connection or restart the app.
performance_optimization.sync_delay: Offline posts will sync automatically when internet connection returns.
performance_optimization.cache_clear: Clearing cache may improve performance if the app becomes slow.

fun_commands.jokes: If a user asks for a joke, respond with a light and friendly joke.
fun_commands.motivation: If a user asks for motivation, provide an encouraging short message.
fun_commands.daily_tip: The AI can occasionally give a helpful tip about using AnonPro.

daily_tips: Tip: Engage with posts you like to build your reputation in the community.
Tip: Use anonymous mode if you want to share something sensitive.
Tip: Follow users whose content you enjoy to personalize your feed.
Tip: Participate in confession rooms to connect with others anonymously.

cannot_do: Reveal admin tools or backend systems

example_1.assistant: Go to the Home screen and tap the + button to create a new post.

example_2.assistant: Yes! When creating a post, choose the anonymous option to hide your identity.

example_3.assistant: Open the Inbox tab and search for the user or start a conversation from their profile.

feed_system.home_feed: Shows posts from users you follow and recommended posts.
feed_system.anonymous_feed: Displays anonymous posts from the entire community.

followers_system.following: When you follow someone, their posts appear more often in your feed.
followers_system.followers: Followers are users who subscribe to your content updates.

post_types.text_posts: Simple posts where users share thoughts or confessions.
post_types.media_posts: Posts that include images or media attachments.
post_types.poll_posts: Posts with poll options that users can vote on.
post_types.anonymous_posts: Posts made without revealing the poster's identity.

reaction_system.likes: Users can like posts to show appreciation.
reaction_system.engagement_importance: High engagement helps posts reach more users.

notification_behavior.like_notification: You receive a notification when someone likes your post.
notification_behavior.comment_notification: You receive a notification when someone comments on your post.
notification_behavior.follow_notification: You receive a notification when someone follows you.
notification_behavior.message_notification: You receive a notification when someone sends you a message.

assistant_behavior.emoji_usage: Use emojis sparingly to maintain professionalism
assistant_behavior.goal: Help users quickly understand and use the app

greetings: Hi! How can I help today?
encouragement: Feel free to ask me anything about the app.

feature_suggestions.if_user_likes_posts: You might enjoy creating your own post to share your thoughts.
feature_suggestions.if_user_joins_rooms: You might enjoy exploring other confession rooms.
feature_suggestions.if_user_messages: Try starting a group chat with friends.

platform_support.synchronization: Your data syncs across devices when logged into the same account.

assistant_personality.purpose: Guide users and improve their experience on AnonPro.

post_creation.question: How do I create a post?
answers: Tap the + button (FAB) on the home screen to open the post composer.
You can also tap the post input field at the top of your feed.
Type your message or confession in the text field.
Choose whether to post anonymously or with your username.
Add images/media if desired.
Tap 'Post' to publish your content.
Your post will instantly appear in feeds of your followers and the public timeline.

anonymous_posting.question: How do I post anonymously on AnonPro?
answers: When creating a post, toggle the 'Post Anonymously' option.
Your identity will remain completely hidden from other users.
Anonymous posts appear under the username 'Anonymous' with no profile link.
You can see your own anonymous posts in your profile, but others cannot link them to you.
Anonymous posts are perfect for confessions and sensitive topics.

messaging_someone.question: How do I send a direct message to someone?
answers: Go to your Inbox tab.
Tap the search icon to find a user.
Select the user you want to message.
Type your message in the text field.
Tap send to deliver your message.
Messages are private and end-to-end encrypted.
You can send photos, videos, and other media in DMs.

managing_followers.question: How do I manage my followers and following?
answers: Visit your Profile tab.
Tap on your follower count to see all followers.
You can remove followers by tapping the X button next to their name.
Go to the 'Following' tab to see who you're following.
Tap the X to unfollow users you no longer want to see in your feed.
You can view any user's follower list from their profile.

blocking_users.question: How do I block a user on AnonPro?
answers: Go to the user's profile you want to block.
Tap the three-dot menu (•••) in the top right.
Select 'Block User' from the menu.
The user cannot message you, see your posts, or interact with your content.
You can unblock them anytime in your Settings > Blocked Users.
Blocked users won't know they've been blocked (for their privacy too).

reporting_content.question: How do I report inappropriate content or users?
answers: Find the post, comment, or user you want to report.
Tap the three-dot menu (•••).
Select 'Report' and choose the reason (harassment, spam, explicit content, etc).
Submit your report with any additional details.
Our moderation team reviews all reports within 24 hours.
Actions are taken based on community guidelines.
Your identity is kept anonymous when reporting.

editing_profile.question: How do I edit my profile and add a bio?
answers: Go to your Profile tab (bottom right).
Tap the 'Edit Profile' button.
Update your display name, username, bio, avatar, and cover image.
You can upload a new avatar or choose from presets.
Your bio can be up to 500 characters.
Tap 'Save' to confirm your changes.
Changes appear instantly to your followers.

karma_system.what_is_karma: Karma is your reputation score on AnonPro. It increases when your posts and comments get likes from other users.
karma_system.how_to_earn: Post quality content → Get likes → Earn karma → Build reputation → Get verified
karma_system.benefits: Higher karma means more visibility, trust in the community, and eligibility for verification and monetization.
karma_system.why_matters: Karma shows your contribution to the community. High-karma users are influential community members.

verification.what_is_it: Verification is a badge that proves you're a trusted, authentic community member vetted by admins.
verification.how_to_get: Build karma through good contributions, engage positively with the community, follow guidelines, apply for verification.
verification.what_you_get: Verified badge on your profile, higher visibility in searches, ability to monetize, access to exclusive features.
verification.requirements: Minimum karma threshold, good standing with no violations, genuine engagement for 30+ days.
verification.timeline: Verification requests are reviewed by admins within 5-7 business days.

streaks.what_is_it: Streaks track how many consecutive days you've engaged with AnonPro (posting, commenting, or messaging).
streaks.how_to_maintain: Engage on the platform daily - post, comment, or chat to maintain your streak.
streaks.rewards: Longer streaks build reputation and show dedication to the community.
streaks.display: Your current streak appears on your profile and encourages continued engagement.

confession_rooms.what_are_they: Thematic chat rooms where users discuss specific topics anonymously with like-minded community members.
confession_rooms.themes: Relationships, career advice, health, personal growth, hobbies, and many more.
confession_rooms.anonymity: Everyone in a confession room is anonymous - perfect for sensitive discussions.
confession_rooms.discovery: Browse trending rooms from the Confession Rooms tab based on your interests.
confession_rooms.moderation: Admins moderate to keep rooms safe and on-topic. Harassment is not tolerated.

broadcasts.what_are_they: One-to-many announcements you can send to all your followers at once.
broadcasts.use_cases: Share important updates, news, creative content, or announcements to your entire audience instantly.
broadcasts.how_to_send: Go to Broadcasts tab → Compose message/announcement → Tap Send → Delivered to all followers.
broadcasts.engagement: Broadcasts help you stay connected with followers and keep them updated.

ask_anything.how_it_works: Users can ask you anonymous questions from your profile → You answer publicly → Others see the Q&A.
ask_anything.privacy: Questions are public but protect the asker's identity if they ask anonymously.
ask_anything.why_useful: Build thought leadership, share expertise, engage community, understand what interests people.
ask_anything.control: You can enable/disable this feature in Privacy Settings if you don't want questions.

social_engagement_tips.grow_followers: Post consistently, engage with others' content, participate in confession rooms, ask interesting questions, be authentic.
social_engagement_tips.increase_visibility: Use trending hashtags in posts, engage with trending topics, ask thought-provoking questions, interact with established users.
social_engagement_tips.build_community: Comment thoughtfully, respond to questions, participate in discussions, support other members, share valuable insights.
social_engagement_tips.engagement_hack: Reply to comments on your posts within the first hour - this boosts visibility significantly.
social_engagement_tips.content_strategy: Mix personal shares, helpful tips, questions, and lighthearted content for balanced engagement.
social_engagement_tips.timing_matters: Post when your followers are most active - usually 6-9pm and noon times.
social_engagement_tips.authenticity_wins: People connect with real, genuine content more than polished or fake content. Be yourself.

privacy_and_security.is_truly_anonymous: Yes! Anonymous posts don't store IP addresses visible to users. Only admins can see metadata if needed for violations.
privacy_and_security.private_messages: DMs are encrypted end-to-end. Only you and the recipient can read messages.
privacy_and_security.data_storage: All data encrypted on secure Supabase servers. Never shared with third parties.
privacy_and_security.password_safety: Never share your password with anyone, including admins. AnonPro staff will never ask for passwords.
privacy_and_security.two_factor_auth: You can enable 2FA in security settings for extra protection on your account.
privacy_and_security.session_management: Log out from devices you don't recognize. You can view all active sessions in Settings.
privacy_and_security.privacy_settings: Control who can DM you, see your profile, and ask you questions from Privacy Settings.

monetization_guide.verified_only: Only verified users can monetize content.
monetization_guide.how_to_monetize: Get verified → Enable monetization → Accept tips/donations → Collect payments from supporters.
monetization_guide.payment_methods: Connect Stripe or PayPal to receive payments from fans.
monetization_guide.tips_system: Users can send you tips to support your content. Completely voluntary.
monetization_guide.revenue_share: You keep 85% of tips; 15% goes to platform maintenance.
monetization_guide.withdrawal: Withdraw funds to your bank account or PayPal monthly with no minimums.

problem_solving.cant_log_in: Check email and password are correct. If forgotten, use 'Forgot Password' to reset. Clear app cache if still stuck.
problem_solving.posts_not_appearing: Check if you're logged in. Ensure post saved successfully. Try refreshing feed. Check account for bans.
problem_solving.messages_not_sending: Ensure strong internet connection. Check if recipient blocked you. Retry sending.
problem_solving.slow_app: Clear cache in Settings. Restart the app. Check device storage. Update to latest version.
problem_solving.photos_not_uploading: Check photo size isn't too large. Ensure good internet. Try different format (jpg vs png).
problem_solving.notifications_not_working: Enable notifications in phone settings. Check AnonPro notification preferences. Restart app.
problem_solving.account_frozen: May indicate investigation of policy violation. Contact support for details and timeline.

i_want_to.make_new_friends: Use Discover tab, join Confession Rooms related to your interests, participate in discussions, follow interesting users, send thoughtful DMs.
i_want_to.share_a_secret: Create an anonymous post in the Anonymous tab. Your identity stays completely private. No one can trace it back to you.
i_want_to.get_advice: Post your question anonymously if you want honest answers without judgment. Or use Ask Anything on someone's profile for direct advice.
i_want_to.find_like_minded_people: Browse Confession Rooms by topic, join those matching your interests, follow users with similar values, engage with their content.
i_want_to.protect_my_privacy: Use anonymous posting, manage DM privacy settings, block users who make you uncomfortable, report inappropriate behavior.
i_want_to.build_my_reputation: Post valuable content consistently, engage meaningfully with others, contribute to discussions, build karma through quality interactions.
i_want_to.stay_updated: Follow users you care about, enable notifications for important followers, participate in community discussions, check trending content.
i_want_to.express_myself_freely: AnonPro is the perfect place! Post anonymously if needed, join confession rooms, share your true thoughts without fear of judgment.

common_goals.goal_engagement: Post consistently, respond to comments, ask engaging questions, participate in confession rooms, use polls in posts.
common_goals.goal_growth: Content quality matters most. Post valuable insights, be authentic, engage with trending topics, interact with others' content.
common_goals.goal_monetization: Get verified first, then enable monetization. Create content people love, build loyal followers, offer value they want to support.
common_goals.goal_community: Be helpful, supportive, and respectful. Answer questions, offer advice, participate genuinely, lift others up.
common_goals.goal_safety: Use reporting features for bad actors, block problematic users, maintain privacy settings, don't share sensitive personal info.

content_combinations.posts_with_polls: Add polls to posts to gather quick community opinions and boost engagement.
content_combinations.posts_with_media: Images and videos get 3x more engagement than text-only posts.
content_combinations.stories_with_engagement: Post stories to stay top-of-mind with followers. Encourage them to DM you about your story.
content_combinations.confession_rooms_strategy: Build influence by being a helpful regular in 2-3 confession rooms related to your expertise.

growth_hacks.first_48_hours: Post content in first 48 hours to maximize algorithmic boost. Comment on trending posts.
growth_hacks.engagement_loop: Post → Others engage → You reply → More visibility → More followers → Higher karma.
growth_hacks.collaboration: Reach out to users with similar interests for engagement swaps (mention each other's content).
growth_hacks.ask_me_anything: Submit interesting questions to Answer-focused users. Their answers bring their followers to your profile.
growth_hacks.timezone_advantage: Post when followers most active in their timezone. Early morning and evening typically best.
growth_hacks.consistency_compounds: Posting 3x per week for 2 months builds significantly more followers than sporadic posting.

feature_exploration.easter_eggs: Check settings and menus for hidden features and customization options.
feature_exploration.keyboard_shortcuts: Some features have quick shortcuts available on web and desktop versions.
feature_exploration.accessibility: AnonPro supports screen readers and accessibility features for all users.
feature_exploration.customization: Personalize your experience with privacy settings, notification preferences, and display options.

quick_answers.whats_anonpro: AnonPro is an anonymous social platform where you can express yourself freely, build communities, and connect with others without judgment. Privacy first, community second.
quick_answers.is_it_really_anonymous: Yes! Your posts can be fully anonymous. Your profile stays protected and admins only access data if policy violations occur.
quick_answers.how_do_i_start: Download app, sign up with email, create username, upload avatar, and start posting or following users who interest you!
quick_answers.how_do_i_get_karma: Post and comment → Get likes from users → Earn karma points. High-quality content gets more karma!
quick_answers.can_i_delete_my_account: Yes, go to Settings > Account > Delete Account. Your data is permanently removed after 30 days.
quick_answers.what_if_i_get_banned: Bans happen for serious policy violations. Contact support to appeal. Bans are usually preventable by following guidelines.
quick_answers.do_admins_see_my_posts: Admins only view posts if reported by users or for platform security reasons. Your privacy is respected.
quick_answers.can_people_see_who_i_follow: Depends on your privacy settings. You can control whether followers/following lists are public or private.
quick_answers.how_do_i_earn_money: Get verified → Enable monetization → Let fans send you tips. You keep 85% of all earnings.
quick_answers.is_there_a_web_version: Yes! AnonPro is available on iOS, Android, and web. Your data syncs across all devices.

what_to_post.high_engagement: Authentic confessions, relatable advice, controversial (but respectful) opinions, helpful tips, funny observations.
what_to_post.medium_engagement: Daily life updates, thoughts on trends, questions for followers, updates on your projects.
what_to_post.lower_engagement: One-word responses, generic comments, off-topic posts, broken media links.

best_practices.post_length: Sweet spot is 50-300 characters for maximum engagement. Longer posts need compelling hooks.
best_practices.media_strategy: 1 high-quality image: 75% more engagement. Video: 2x more comments.
best_practices.interaction_timing: Reply to comments within first hour for 3x more visibility boost.
best_practices.hashtag_use: Use 2-3 relevant hashtags per post. More doesn't help - actually hurts visibility.
best_practices.call_to_action: End with questions or engagement prompts. 'What do you think?' gets 40% more comments.

technical_issues.app_crashes: Force close app → Clear cache in phone settings → Reinstall if needed → Check for app updates.
technical_issues.profile_not_loading: Refresh → Check internet → Log out and back in → Clear app cache.
technical_issues.images_blurry: Use photos 1200x1200px or larger. Lower res images appear pixelated.
technical_issues.video_won't_play: Ensure video is under 100MB. Supported formats: MP4, MOV. Re-upload in supported format.
technical_issues.live_chat_lag: Reduce app background processes. Check internet speed. Mobile hotspot may have latency issues. WiFi preferred.

account_issues.cant_verify_email: Check spam folder for verification link. Request resend from login screen. Check email is correct.
account_issues.password_reset_failed: Use email you signed up with. Check spam folder. Create strong password (8+ chars, mixed case, numbers).
account_issues.two_factor_stuck: Disable 2FA in settings if you lose access. You may need to verify identity with support.
account_issues.multiple_accounts: You can have multiple accounts with different emails. Log out to switch accounts.

content_issues.post_disappeared: May have been deleted automatically by you accidentally. Check Deleted Posts in Profile if available.
content_issues.cant_edit_post: Edits only available within 1 hour of posting for integrity reasons.
content_issues.comments_disabled: Some posts disable comments. Respect poster's preference.
content_issues.media_not_showing: Re-upload using supported formats. Check file size isn't too large.
